summary: Iteration 16: Tested all backup/restore features. All 7 backend API tests and all UI elements pass. Backup download, server backup creation, history display, specific file download, restore, auto-backup on clear-all, and delete all work correctly. MongoDB Atlas accordion expands with content. Frontend shows history with per-backup download/delete buttons.

test_results.1_download_to_pc: PASS - GET /api/backup/download returns JSON with Content-Disposition: attachment. data-testid='backup-download-btn' visible.
test_results.2_save_to_server: PASS - POST /api/backup/create returns {success:true, filename}. data-testid='backup-server-btn' works. History updates after click.
test_results.3_backup_history: PASS - Historial shows after backup creation. data-testid='backup-dl-{filename}' and 'backup-del-{filename}' buttons found (5 entries).
test_results.4_restore_from_file: PASS - POST /api/backup/restore accepts JSON upload and returns {success:true, message}. restoreInputRef works.
test_results.5_auto_backup_on_clear: PASS - DELETE /api/data/clear-all?auto_backup=true returns {auto_backup_created:true}. History count increases.
test_results.6_mongodb_atlas_accordion: PASS - 'Conectar base de datos en la nube' accordion expands showing MongoDB Atlas guide content.
test_results.8_api_backup_history: PASS - returns list with filename, size_kb, created_at

seed_data_creation: test clear-all executed during testing (auto-backup was created first). Existing test backup backup_manual_20260415_181306.json preserved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backup features working: /api/backup/download, /api/backup/create, /api/backup/history, /api/backup/{filename}/download, /api/backup/{filename} DELETE, /api/backup/restore, /api/data/clear-all?auto_backup=true. Max 15 backups kept. BACKUP_DIR=/app/backend/backups/. K8s ingress still strips 4xx response bodies - use 200+ok flag pattern.
